docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERRIOS, JUBERT LEONEL JUDGMENT OF JAN-27-1993 SET ASIDE
REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERRIOS, JUBERT LEONEL AS TO DEFENDANT NUNN, FLOYD E, IND & DBA DORATECHNOLOGY
